title: ICCA 2026
summary: Biennial flagship congress of the International Council for Commercial Arbitration, the premier global gathering for international arbitration practitioners.

title: YIAG Fireside Chat in Madrid
summary: Informal discussion on international arbitration issues for young practitioners hosted by LCIA's YIAG in Madrid.

title: ICC Tokyo Arbitration Day
summary: ICC event in Tokyo examining international arbitration developments relevant to Japanese and Asian markets.

title: Prague Arbitration Day
summary: Annual Prague arbitration conference discussing contemporary issues in international commercial arbitration with Central European focus.

title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
summary: Young practitioners' symposium on international arbitration hosted by the LCIA's Young International Arbitration Group at Tylney Hall.

title: London International Disputes Week 2026
summary: Seventh annual gathering of global international disputes community featuring 150+ events over five days. Theme: Tradition, trust and transformation in international dispute resolution. Expected 10,000+ attendees from 100+ countries.

title: International Arbitration Day
summary: Opening day event for London International Disputes Week focusing on international arbitration practice and developments.

title: LIDW Opening Reception
summary: Opening reception at Southwark Cathedral to launch London International Disputes Week, providing networking opportunities for international disputes professionals.

title: LIDW Main Conference
summary: Primary LIDW conference for 700+ delegates covering international dispute resolution topics including arbitration, litigation and mediation with drinks reception.

title: LegalTech Showcase
summary: Showcase of legal technology solutions and innovations for international disputes practitioners during London International Disputes Week.

title: LIDW NextGen Social at Boulebar
summary: Informal social networking event at Boulebar for junior and young-at-heart practitioners in international dispute resolution during LIDW.

title: LIDW Gala Dinner
summary: Formal gala dinner at Raffles London providing networking opportunity for international disputes community during LIDW.

title: 43rd Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
organiser: Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
topics: Financial Crime; Fraud; AML; Bribery; ABC; Sanctions; Enforcement; Compliance
summary: Week-long symposium at Jesus College, Cambridge covering economic crime topics. Attendees can register for the full week or individual days, with lunch, cocktails, dinner, and optional accommodation included.

title: Dispute Resolution in the International Energy Business
summary: Two-day joint LCIA-AIEN conference examining arbitration, litigation and dispute resolution practices in the international energy sector.
